title: How on Earth could Asuka
wikitext:
[]: How on Earth could Asuka... [2.0 Spoilers]             Quote Post by DiscoUkulele » Sun Aug 23, 2009 11:47 am ...survive her fight with Eva-01? If she wasn't crushed to death when it chomped down on her entry plug, it seems like she would have plummeted to her death. :( Granted, I'm sure that applies to Touji, too (being crushed pretty high in the air by Eva-01's hand).

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Aug 23, 2009 12:02 pm Plot hax. Regarding the heigth issue: Shinji got into direct control of Unit-01 after the Dummy System deactivated, so it is possible that he took the Plug out of "his" mouth and gave it to the medical staff who just... happened... to be there. Yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Aug 23, 2009 1:23 pm So that something even more soul-crushing can happen later, instead, probably :(

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sun Aug 23, 2009 2:07 pm And remember that Asuka's plug depth went off the chart, and the plug was crushed by the middle sooo....Asuka is ALIVE!! ;)

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Sun Aug 23, 2009 3:03 pm In regards to the entry plug falling out of Unit-01's mouth thus killing Asuka, don't forget, Rei's entry plug fell from a higher depth in episode 5/ 1.0 when Unit 00 went berserk. If Rei was able to survive that accident, it seems Asuka would be able to do the same. If the teeth just *happened* to miss Asuka, thats another plausible explanation for her living

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Aug 23, 2009 3:04 pm She didn't survive. They CLONED HER!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva4Dummies » Sun Aug 23, 2009 5:44 pm They CLONED HER!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:19 pm She survived so her death can be truly brutal in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:28 pm NOOOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Don't kill my Asuka-Sama!!!!!! Think of all the fans Anno-Sama would loose by killing off one of if not the most beloved characters in the franchise!!! Although, as follishly naive as this wish is seeing how it is Eva were talking about after all, I really dont want anyone short of Gendo to get the axe.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:40 pm Considering her plug depth and the way Unit 01 bit down, her body should have been crushed. At the very least her legs would be gone; if the Asuka in 3.0 is not a clone or regenerated in some way, it is indeed impossible for her to have survived with only a need for an eyepatch.

[]:             Quote Post by Soul Fire » Sun Aug 23, 2009 7:04 pm Considering her plug depth and the way Unit 01 bit down, her body should have been crushed. At the very least her legs would be gone; if the Asuka in 3.0 is not a clone or regenerated in some way, it is indeed impossible for her to have survived with only a need for an eyepatch.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 23, 2009 8:00 pm It's Eva. It's anime. This shouldn't come as a surprise that she somehow survived, considering she probably WILL die in an more brutal way if 3I ends up occurring.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Sun Aug 23, 2009 9:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: considering she probably WILL die in an more brutal way if 3I ends up occurring.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:44 am Evafan wrote: Edit: It isn't like Eva to just do something "for the sake of the story" at least not often

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Mon Aug 24, 2009 12:50 pm How could it be? Just look at this accurate depiction of Asuka's incident. [URL=http://img91.imageshack.us/img91/2309/jetasuka.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Mon Aug 24, 2009 7:25 pm my bitter judgement to this is that she may have survived physically, but her mental state could be, probably, most likely to be unstable, but somehow she snaps out of it and continue to terrorize Shinji and force him to make bentou for her everyday.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Mon Aug 24, 2009 8:53 pm Eva4Dummies wrote: They CLONED HER!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Aug 24, 2009 8:58 pm bedoop bedoop "Asuka, do you think love can bloom on the battlefield?" "Ante baka! Can't you see I'm shooting down mooks. Go hide in the closet or something. I'll listen to you whine when my life isn't in danger!"

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:55 pm Eva4Dummies wrote: They CLONED HER!!!

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Tue Aug 25, 2009 9:16 am The falling problem isn't too hard to solve. The pilots have survived similar massive shocks while inside the EVAs before, probably due to being immersed in LCL. Liquid suspension has been used to cushion against massive g-forces since back in the old Lensman novels. Assuming that the plug didn't drain entirely before hitting the ground, there would probably be enough LCL left inside to prevent fatal injury from the impact. Remember that Rei didn't die when her plug fell from an even greater height inside the activation chamber.
